cognition.rationale: During an end-of-session hygiene review, a local credential file was found at the root of a working repository. Verified it had never been tracked or committed to version control, so no exposure occurred and no credential rotation was required. Moved the file to secure storage outside any repository and added ignore patterns so that local credential or secret files cannot be accidentally staged in future. The remediation was confined to local file hygiene and a non-normative gitignore change committed via the standard branch-and-merge workflow; no normative standard content was affected.

counterfactuals.alternative_action: Leave the file at the repository root and rely on manual care to avoid committing it.
Rotate the credentials as a precaution even though verification showed no exposure.
